message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor black
  LifeLineBorderColor #999999
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #333333
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ActorBorderColor #333333
  ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BoxBorderColor #333333
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFED6
  NoteBorderColor #999999
  GroupBorderColor #333333
  GroupBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  DividerBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  DividerBorderColor #333333
}

actor Customer as C
participant Device as D #E6E6FA
participant DeviceProvisioningService as DPS #00E5EE
participant ProductIoTHub as HUB #00E5EE
participant FWProvider as FW #FF00FF

note over D,DPS,HUB,FW
Device was registered for this product before
end note

== First start ==

C -> D : 1 Switch On/Power Up
note over D : Booting up

D -> DPS : 2 registerDevice(callback)
DPS --> D : 3 callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ASSIGNED, IoTHubURI, deviceId)
D -> D : 4 setProperties
D -> HUB : 5 iamNewToYou(deviceId, firmwareversion)

opt Firmware needs to be updated
  HUB --> D : 6 updateFWMandantory(URL)
  D -> FW : 7 URL.get(OLDFW)
  FW --> D : 8 FW, Checksum
  note over D : Downloading
  D -> D : 9 CheckChecksum
  note over D : Installing
  D -> D : 10 update
  D -> D : 11 restart
  note over D : Booting up
  D -> HUB : 12 iamNewToYou(deviceId, firmwareversion)
end

HUB --> D : 13 youMayStartSending()
D -> HUB : 14 sendData(Data)
note over D : Working

== Claim / Remove ==

HUB --> D : 15 youMustRetire()
D -> D : 16 waits

opt if Device was not reached
  D -> HUB : 17 sendData(Data)
  HUB --> D : 18 Not registered
end

D -> DPS : 19 registerDevice(callback)
DPS --> D : 20 callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ERROR, null, null)
D -> D : 21 NobodyLovesMeMode()

loop once a day
  D -> DPS : 22 registerDevice(callback)
end

== IoT Hub not available ==

loop several times
  D -> HUB : 23 sendData(Data)
  HUB --> D : 24 NotAvailable/Network Error
end

D -> DPS : 25 registerDevice(callback)
DPS --> D : 26 callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ASSIGNED, IoTHubURI, deviceId)
D -> D : 27 compare IoTHub and change if necessary

note over D,DPS,HUB,FW
if connection is now successful, go on. If not and IoT Hub has not changed
repeat with low frequence. Also if DPS is not available.
end note

@enduml
